title: Share item specific updates with external teams
excerpt: We work with external vendors and clients who manage their own boards. Is there a way to ensure any updates they make reflect on our board too, without manually checking?

posts.author: andrew92 (Andrew Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: We work with external vendors and clients who manage their own boards. Is there a way to ensure any updates they make reflect on our board too, without manually checking?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s an app called Same Item Multiple Boards that I’d recommend. Any column changes and updates ‘flow both directions’

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @andrew92 ,
The Board Email Reports got you back with this case.
It’s the unique app that provides reports on item updates. The types of reports:
On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

An example:

image1386×555 53 KB

The message in my inbox with xls-attachment where you can find updates details:

image395×499 21 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful.
